message:
Comprehensive deep review of all beads with enhanced specifications

- Enhanced E2E test harness (bd-1xy) with fluent assertions, fixtures, logging verification
- Enhanced non-blocking command execution (bd-1kd) with process tracking and timeout
- Enhanced ImageCache struct (bd-hgu) with content-addressable storage and stats
- Enhanced file watcher (bd-2ui) with debouncing and editor compatibility
- Enhanced bash export (bd-3aj) with proper escaping and multi-device support
- Enhanced GestureDetector (bd-2js) with complete state machine and tests
- Enhanced axum server skeleton (bd-b14) with CORS, auto-open, health check

All beads now include:
- Comprehensive implementation code samples
- Unit test examples
- Logging requirements (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR)
- Success criteria checklists

Structure verified with bv:
- 152 beads, 19 dependency edges
- No cycles (proper DAG)
- Key blockers: MockDevice (bd-180) unblocks 10 test beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
